summary: Comprehensive performance optimization testing for CRMaster CRM. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Dashboard stats, Customers page with filter dropdowns, and Kanban page with all 6 status columns. Key optimizations tested: lightweight filter-options endpoint (replaces 609KB → ~10KB), latest-per-customer calls endpoint, stats caching (30s), pagination, and Kanban field selection.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/customers/filter-options - Returns unique values for market, application, city, competitor, partner, assigned_to
✅ GET /api/customers/filter-options - Response size under 100KB (previously 609KB for all customers)
✅ GET /api/customers/filter-options - Caching works (60s TTL)
✅ GET /api/customers/filter-options - Values are sorted alphabetically
✅ GET /api/calls/latest-per-customer - Returns customer_id → outcome mapping
✅ GET /api/calls/latest-per-customer - Response size under 50KB (lightweight)
✅ GET /api/calls/latest-per-customer - Outcome values are valid strings
✅ GET /api/stats - Returns all dashboard fields (total_customers, total_visits, distributions)
✅ GET /api/stats - Distributions format correct (_id, count)
✅ GET /api/stats - Caching works (30s TTL)
✅ GET /api/customers?limit=50 - Pagination response format correct (data, total, page, limit, total_pages)
✅ GET /api/customers?limit=10 - Custom limit works
✅ GET /api/customers?page=1&page=2 - Page navigation returns different data
✅ GET /api/customers?search=test - Search filter works with pagination
✅ GET /api/customers?status=Beklemede - Status filter works correctly
✅ GET /api/kanban/customers - Returns customers grouped by status (6 columns)
✅ GET /api/kanban/customers - Returns only lightweight fields (no notes_list, documents)
✅ GET /api/kanban/customers - Manageable response size
✅ POST /api/customers - Creates customer and invalidates filter-options cache
✅ PUT /api/customers/{id} - Updates customer and invalidates cache
✅ DELETE /api/customers/{id} - Deletes customer and invalidates cache
✅ Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats (3679 customers, 2 visits, charts)
✅ Frontend: Customers page loads with 50 rows, pagination (page 1/74)
✅ Frontend: Filter dropdowns (Market, Durum, Şehir, Uygulama, Rakip, Partner, Arama) populated
✅ Frontend: Kanban page shows all 6 status columns (Beklemede:2936, İletişimde:593, Teklif Verildi:22, Çalışılıyor:106, Kazanıldı:1, Kaybedildi:19)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: /api/customers/filter-options uses server-side caching (60s TTL) with _filter_options_cache
Backend: /api/calls/latest-per-customer returns only {customer_id: outcome} map - very lightweight
Backend: /api/stats uses select() with specific fields instead of select(*) + 30s cache
Backend: /api/kanban/customers selects only needed fields for cards
Backend: Cache invalidation triggered on POST/PUT/DELETE customers
Frontend: Customers.jsx uses fetchAllFilterOptions() calling new lightweight endpoint
Frontend: Customers.jsx uses fetchCalls() calling latest-per-customer endpoint
Frontend: App.js uses React.lazy for code splitting on all pages
seed_data_creation: 3 test customers created and deleted during cache invalidation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimization fully tested. Key endpoints: 1) /api/customers/filter-options (60s cache, returns unique dropdown values), 2) /api/calls/latest-per-customer (returns latest call outcome per customer), 3) /api/stats (30s cache, uses select() with specific fields), 4) /api/kanban/customers (selects only needed fields for cards). Frontend uses React.lazy for code splitting. All caches invalidated on customer CRUD operations.
